message:
feat(core): add priority inheritance and lock-order protocol types (ft-2p9cb.2.3.1)

Priority levels (Background/Normal/Elevated/Critical), Resource enum with
canonical lock order, PriorityInheritanceTracker with inheritance, waiter
promotion, lock-order violation detection. 25 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
